name: Gatecrasher
source: Starfinder Dead Suns Adventure Path pg. 269
melee: advanced swoop hammer +22 (3d10+18 B; critical knockdown)
ranged: aurora shock caster +19 (2d12+10 E, explode [15 ft., DC 19])
other_abilities: integral upgrades (forcepack, haste circuit, targeting computer), unliving
gear: advanced swoop hammer, aurora shock caster with 3 high-capacity batteries (40 charges each)

special_abilities.name: Integral Upgrades (Su)
special_abilities.description: A gatecrasher can install up to three armor upgrades (each with an item level no greater than the gatecrasher’s CR) into its heavily armored frame. It’s treated as wearing heavy or powered armor for this purpose. Its armor upgrades cannot be damaged or removed unless the gatecrasher is destroyed and leaves intact physical remains.

special_abilities.name: Juggernaut of Destruction (Ex)
special_abilities.description: A gatecrasher can use a two-handed weapon in one hand without taking a penalty, and when wielding two such weapons, as a full action can attack with each weapon once (taking a –6 penalty to each attack roll and to the saving throw DCs of any special properties or critical hit effects the weapons have), even if either weapon has the unwieldy weapon special property. A gatecrasher can use any weapons designed for creatures within one size category of its size without penalty.

description: Gatecrashers are undead abominations, horrific blends of powered armor and necromancy-infused flesh. These undead monstrosities revel in combat, seeking it out wherever possible.

Special Abilities
Integral Upgrades (Su)
A gatecrasher can install up to three armor upgrades (each with an item level no greater than the gatecrasher’s CR) into its heavily armored frame. It’s treated as wearing heavy or powered armor for this purpose. Its armor upgrades cannot be damaged or removed unless the gatecrasher is destroyed and leaves intact physical remains.
Juggernaut of Destruction (Ex)
A gatecrasher can use a two-handed weapon in one hand without taking a penalty, and when wielding two such weapons, as a full action can attack with each weapon once (taking a –6 penalty to each attack roll and to the saving throw DCs of any special properties or critical hit effects the weapons have), even if either weapon has the unwieldy weapon special property. A gatecrasher can use any weapons designed for creatures within one size category of its size without penalty.
Description
Gatecrashers are undead abominations, horrific blends of powered armor and necromancy-infused flesh. These undead monstrosities revel in combat, seeking it out wherever possible.
